summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of futuristic website transformation. All futuristic elements working perfectly including floating orbs, pulsing grid, scanline effects, animated gradient borders, glow effects, and animated rings.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all futuristic elements (floating orbs, pulsing grid, scanline effects)
Blog page loads and works correctly with proper navigation
Blog post page loads when clicking blog cards with proper content
Navigation links work smoothly (About, Solutions, Why Us sections)
Booking modal opens and closes correctly
Card hover effects work (animated gradient borders on solution cards)
Glow effects work on why cards
CTA section displays animated rings properly
All animations are smooth and performant
Mobile responsiveness works across different screen sizes
Dark futuristic theme is properly implemented
